## Phase 1 Boundary Check

- [ ] Rust-only change.
- [ ] Headless-first change.
- [ ] No UI framework added.
- [ ] No TypeScript, Node, Bun, npm, Tauri, Electron, GPUI, egui, or Slint added.
- [ ] No real provider API calls added.
- [ ] No database implementation added.
- [ ] Core remains domain-neutral.

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo check -p <crate>`
- [ ] `cargo test -p <crate> --lib`
- [ ] `cargo check --workspace`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --lib`
- [ ] Not run. Reason:

## Disk Safety

- [ ] No `cargo clean`.
- [ ] No watch process, dev server, daemon, or background loop.
- [ ] No coverage, profiling, trace, benchmark, or large log output.
- [ ] No broad deletion command.
- [ ] No generated build output committed.
